title: Legacy001 RealMLP micro-sweep
summary: Make one small RealMLP hyperparameter change to test whether the legacy-001 neural model is underfit or already saturated.
rationale: The parent RealMLP uses a fixed ensemble size, epoch count, batch size, hidden layout, and dropout. A single micro-sweep change can use the available GPU without confounding model tuning with feature or ensemble changes.
implementation_hint: Patch exactly one RealMLP setting, such as n_epochs 5 to 8, n_ens 20 to 32, batch_size 256 to 512, hidden_sizes [512,256,128] to [768,384,192], or p_drop 0.05 to 0.10. Preserve feature engineering, validation folds, original-data handling, and submission outputs.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if the current RealMLP is underfit or benefits from a larger ensemble or slightly different regularization.
risk: Higher capacity or longer training can overfit and increase runtime; changing more than one knob would make the result hard to attribute.
